summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Fade By Tom barbershop landing page. All major functionality working correctly including hero section, navigation, services display, gallery, contact information, and Google Maps integration.

ui_bugs.issue: Timeout when clicking navigation links after mobile menu opens

passed_tests: Hero section displays with logo, tagline, and CTA buttons
Navigation links work and scroll to correct sections
About section displays with storefront image and stats (15+ Years, 5000+ Clients, 7 Barbers)
Services section shows all 7 services with cards (Fades, Mohawk, Linings, Blow Out, Eyebrows, Razor Fades, Full Graphics)
Hours section shows business hours correctly (Mon-Fri 10-7, Sat 9-6, Sun Closed)
Contact section shows phone (773-685-7744) and address (5812 Irving Park Rd)
Google Maps iframe loads with correct address
Call Now buttons link to tel:773-685-7744 (hero, header, services, contact)
Mobile responsive navigation button works (menu opens)
Footer displays with barber pole animation
Phone number links are correctly formatted
Address links to Google Maps correctly
